name: read_file
description: Reads a file at the given path and returns its contents as a string. Raises an error if the file does not exist.

name: write_file
description: Writes content to a file at the specified path. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites it if it does.

name: list_directory
description: Lists the files and subdirectories in a directory. Returns a JSON array of entry names. Raises an error if the path is not a directory.

name: search_files
description: Recursively searches for files whose names match a glob pattern within a directory tree.

name: send_slack_message
description: Posts a message to a Slack channel on behalf of the configured bot user.

name: list_github_repos
description: Lists repositories accessible to the authenticated GitHub App installation.

name: create_github_issue
description: Creates a new GitHub issue in the specified repository.

name: execute_sql
description: Executes a read-only SQL SELECT query against the configured database and returns the results as a JSON array.

name: get_weather
description: Returns the current weather conditions for a given city name or lat/lon coordinates.

name: run_shell_command
description: Executes a shell command in the working directory and returns stdout and stderr.

name: search_web
description: Performs a web search and returns the top results as a list of {title, url, snippet} objects.

name: get_calendar_events
description: Returns calendar events within a date range for the authenticated user.

name: list_drive_files
description: Lists files in Google Drive matching an optional query. Supports the Drive query language for filtering by name, type, or parent folder.

name: send_email
description: Sends an email from the authenticated Gmail account to one or more recipients.

name: create_notion_page
description: Creates a new page in the configured Notion workspace under the specified parent page or database.

name: add_stripe_customer
description: Creates a new customer record in Stripe with the provided email and optional metadata.

name: resize_image
description: Resizes an image to the specified dimensions. Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP formats.

name: translate_text
description: Translates text from a source language to a target language using the configured translation service.

name: get_git_log
description: Returns the git commit history for a repository path, optionally filtered by branch and max count.

name: run_tests
description: Runs the test suite for the project at the given path and returns the test results as structured JSON.
